API Documentation

Access DevForge agents and services via REST APIs

Agent Orchestration

High-level task execution

localhost:8001Docs

Browser Control

Low-level browser automation

localhost:8002Docs

Task Orchestrator

Task coordination and monitoring

localhost:8003Docs

Quick Start

# Start all APIs
bash scripts/start-agents-api.sh

# Health check
curl http://localhost:8001/health

# Create task
curl -X POST http://localhost:8001/api/agents/browser/task \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "description": "Navigate to example.com",
    "url": "https://example.com"
  }'

Python Client

from ml.orchestrator_client import get_client

# Create client
client = get_client()

# Generate test
result = client.generate_test_sync(
    "Test login functionality",
    "http://localhost:3000/login"
)

# Check status
stats = client.get_stats()

Key Endpoints

POST
/api/agents/browser/task

Execute browser automation

POST
/api/agents/test-generator/generate

Generate tests from description

POST
/api/agents/bug-detector/scan

Scan website for bugs

GET
/api/tasks/{task_id}

Get task status and result

GET
/api/stats

Get platform statistics
